entities.name: mavacamten
entities.context: Mavacamten (MYK-461, Camzyos) is a first-in-class selective cardiac myosin inhibitor.

entities.name: MYH7
entities.context: Target: Beta-cardiac myosin heavy chain (MYH7, UniProt: P12883)

entities.name: beta-cardiac myosin
entities.context: stabilizing an auto-inhibited (super-relaxed) state of beta-cardiac myosin (MYH7)

entities.name: cardiac myosin ATPase
entities.context: Mavacamten selectively inhibits cardiac myosin ATPase

entities.name: MYH1
entities.context: >100-fold selective for cardiac myosin over fast skeletal myosin (MYH1)

entities.name: MYBPC3
entities.context: mutations in MYH7 or MYBPC3 cause excessive cross-bridge formation

entities.name: hypertrophic cardiomyopathy
entities.context: FDA approved April 28, 2022 for symptomatic oHCM (NYHA class II-III)

entities.name: cardiac myosin ATPase inhibition

attributes.binding_site: allosteric site on myosin motor domain

entities.context: selectively inhibits cardiac myosin ATPase by stabilizing an auto-inhibited (super-relaxed) state

entities.name: sarcomere contractile pathway
entities.context: Sarcomere contractile unit

entities.name: EXPLORER-HCM
entities.context: EXPLORER-HCM (NCT03470545): Phase III, mavacamten vs placebo in oHCM. Primary endpoint met.

entities.name: VALOR-HCM
entities.context: VALOR-HCM (NCT04349072): Phase III, patients eligible for septal reduction therapy.

entities.name: FDA approval of mavacamten
entities.context: FDA approved April 28, 2022 for symptomatic oHCM (NYHA class II-III). REMS program required.

entities.name: dizziness
entities.context: Key AEs: dizziness (11%), syncope (4%), atrial fibrillation (4%)

entities.name: syncope
entities.context: Key AEs: dizziness (11%), syncope (4%), atrial fibrillation (4%)

entities.name: atrial fibrillation
entities.context: Key AEs: dizziness (11%), syncope (4%), atrial fibrillation (4%)

entities.name: heart failure
entities.context: Black box warning: Risk of heart failure due to systolic dysfunction.

entities.name: CYP2C19
entities.context: Primarily metabolized by CYP2C19 and CYP3A4.

entities.name: CYP3A4
entities.context: Primarily metabolized by CYP2C19 and CYP3A4.

entities.name: CYP2C19 poor metabolizer
entities.context: CYP2C19 poor metabolizers have ~2-fold higher exposure.

entities.name: fluconazole
entities.context: Strong CYP2C19 inhibitors (fluconazole, fluvoxamine) are contraindicated.

entities.name: fluvoxamine
entities.context: Strong CYP2C19 inhibitors (fluconazole, fluvoxamine) are contraindicated.

entities.name: LVEF
entities.context: Contraindicated: LVEF < 55%

entities.name: myosin motor domain
entities.context: Binding site: Allosteric site on the myosin motor domain
